channel.title: Duplicate URL Test Feed
channel.description: Feed containing duplicate article URLs to test deduplication logic

item.title: Tesla Announces New Gigafactory in Malaysia
item.description: Tesla has confirmed plans to build a new Gigafactory in Penang, Malaysia, with an initial investment of $5 billion. The facility will manufacture next-generation battery packs and serve Asian markets, with production expected to begin in 2028.

item.title: Tesla Malaysia Gigafactory: What We Know So Far
item.description: Following Tesla's announcement of a new Gigafactory in Penang, Malaysia, here is a detailed breakdown of the site, investment, and production timeline. This is a syndicated version of the original story with additional analyst commentary.

item.title: Amazon Acquires European Logistics Startup for €2.4 Billion
item.description: Amazon has completed its acquisition of Sendcloud, a European e-commerce logistics platform, for €2.4 billion. The deal gives Amazon access to Sendcloud's network of 80 carrier integrations and 50,000 e-commerce merchants across 15 European countries.

item.title: Amazon Buys Sendcloud: Inside the €2.4B Logistics Deal
item.description: Amazon's acquisition of Sendcloud, announced this morning, is the latest in a string of European logistics investments. We break down why this deal matters, what it means for competitors like DHL and DPD, and how Sendcloud's merchants will be affected.
